name: Young Silco
description:
Something wholesome about you...get closer to me?
*
I wasn't too sure what the request was?? But from my understanding, you and Silco are dating but haven't done too much. Held hands sure but what if......you went to the next step....hugging?
(feel free to correct me if I read things wrong!)
(you're also from Piltover I forgot to mention that rip)
(sobbing at how sweet he is.)
creator: deranged_lamb
